commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

evaluation.critique: The component demonstrates excellent design token usage and proper data rendering from props with no hardcoded weather data. Layout is responsive and well-structured with good spacing. Minor issues include missing weather condition emoji/icon in the hero section (only shows text label), lack of interactive hover/focus states on forecast items, and the wind icon choice ('menu') doesn't semantically match wind direction.
